label: Stranger Things
blurb: Hawkins, Indiana. One quote at a time. Name the character who said it.

quotes.hint: Season 1 — a rule she holds Mike to
Season 1 — her favorite insult, learned from the boys
Season 2 — said to her own reflection, new look

quotes.q: Mornings are for coffee and contemplation.
quotes.hint: Season 1 — the chief's house rule at the station

quotes.q: She's our friend and she's crazy!
quotes.hint: Season 1 — shouted mid-chase about a certain friend

quotes.q: Why are you keeping this curiosity door locked?
quotes.hint: Season 2 — pestering a scientist for answers

quotes.q: We never would've upset you if we knew you had superpowers.
There's more to life than stupid boys, you know.
quotes.hint: Season 3 — advice dispensed at the mall

quotes.q: If we're both going crazy, then we'll go crazy together.
quotes.hint: Season 1 — a promise made over a walkie-talkie

quotes.q: You can't spell America without Erica.
quotes.hint: Season 3 — negotiating her fee in free ice cream

quotes.q: You shouldn't like things because people tell you you're supposed to.
quotes.hint: Season 1 — big-brother advice about fitting in

quotes.q: Fabergé Organics. Use the shampoo and conditioner.
quotes.hint: Season 2 — the hair secret, finally revealed
